message: 🌱 Add kubeflow: KFAM is unprotected and any user can manage all profiles / mission (#634)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubeflow-6228-kfam-is-unprotected-and-any-user-can-manage-all-profiles-namespace",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubeflow: KFAM is unprotected and any user can manage all profiles / namespaces of other users.",
+    "description": "KFAM is unprotected and any user can manage all profiles / namespaces of other users.. This issue affects 9+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kubeflow troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kubeflow deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow -n kubeflow --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `HTTP/1.1 403 Forbidden`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubeflow configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubeflow configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow
kubectl get configmap -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubeflow
```
Kubeflow version: 1.4
KFAM is completely unprotected."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for KFAM is unprotected and any user can manage all profiles /",
+        "description": "Solves: https://github.com/kubeflow/kubeflow/issues/6228

This PR secures access to KFAM so it is not accessible to users.

/
```yaml
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: kfam
  namespace: kubeflow
  labels:
    kustomize.component: profiles
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: [cluster.local/ns/kubeflow/sa/centraldashboard]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
    - operation:
        methods: ["POST"]
    - operation:
        methods: ["DELETE"]
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      kustomize.component: profiles
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm KFAM is unprotected and any user can manage all is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow -n kubeflow --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n kubeflow --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `HTTP/1.1 403 Forbidden` no longer appears in logs."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Solves: https://github.com/kubeflow/kubeflow/issues/6228

This PR secures access to KFAM so it is not accessible to users.

/",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: kfam
  namespace: kubeflow
  labels:
    kustomize.component: profiles
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: [cluster.local/ns/kubeflow/sa/centraldashboard]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
    - operation:
        methods: ["POST"]
    - operation:
        methods: ["DELETE"]
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      kustomize.component: profiles",
+        "kind: Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
metadata:
  name: centraldashboard
  namespace: kubeflow
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: 'true'
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  labels:
    kustomize.component: profiles
  name: profiles-deployment
  namespace: kubeflow
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      kustomize.component: profiles
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"",
+        "kind: NetworkPolicy
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
metadata:
  name: kubeflow
  namespace: kubeflow
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchExpressions:
      - key: app
        operator: NotIn
        values:
          - minio        # artifact storage
          - ml-pipeline  # pipeline api server
          - poddefaults  # mutating webhook 
          - cache-server # mutating webhook
      - key: component
        operator: NotIn
        values:
          - metadata-grpc-server # metadata server
      - key: katib.kubeflow.org/component
        operator: NotIn
        values:
          - controller # katib mutating webhook to add metrics logger
          - db-manager # the metrics loggers write directly to this database
      - key: control-plane
        operator: NotIn
        values:
        "
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kubeflow",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kubeflow"
+    ],

+      "Pod",
+      "Deployment",
+      "Ingress"

+    },
